allow: PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8888/pages/conductor.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content; "Page length: $\($html.Length\) chars"; if \($html -match '<body'\) { "Has body tag: yes" } else { "Has body tag: NO" }; if \($html -match '<style'\) { "Has style tag: yes" } else { "Has style tag: NO" }; if \($html -match '<script'\) { "Has script tag: yes" } else { "Has script tag: NO" }; if \($html -match 'cd-shell'\) { "Has cd-shell class: yes" } else { "Has cd-shell class: NO" }; if \($html -match 'view-board'\) { "Has board view: yes" } else { "Has board view: NO" }; if \($html -match 'view-dag'\) { "Has DAG view: yes" } else { "Has DAG view: NO" }; if \($html -match 'view-deploy'\) { "Has deploy view: yes" } else { "Has deploy view: NO" })
PowerShell(gh repo list ALDC-io --limit 100 --json name,sshUrl --jq '.[].name' | Sort-Object)

PowerShell($missing = @\('atlas','auth-api','concept-eminence-general','concept-f92-general','concept-gep-data','concept-j5-general','dispatcher','eclipse-demo','el-famoso-prototype','esapet-dashboard','experimental','fbc-partner-ecosystem-visualization','internal-business-model','kisti','mcp_server_memory','ohmco-dashboard','portal','quickstart-api','quickstarts','seattle-orcas-prototype','upventure-dashboard','zeus-chat-exp','zeus-decision-graph-visualization'\); foreach \($repo in $missing\) { Write-Host "Cloning $repo..."; git clone "https://github.com/ALDC-io/$repo.git" "C:\\Users\\PaulRussell\\repos\\$repo" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 1; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\PaulRussell\\.env | Select-String "^ZEUS_API_KEY="\).ToString\(\).Split\("=",2\)[1]; $tenant = "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111"; $body1 = @{ content = "Confirmed: ALDC-io GitHub org has ~35 repos but only ~12 were cloned locally. Running `gh repo list ALDC-io --limit 100` is the reliable way to enumerate all repos. 23 new repos were cloned this session. The experimental chat repo is `zeus-chat-exp`, not `zeus-chat`."; source = "cce_success_log"; tags = @\("conductor","repo-management","aldc-io","discovery"\) } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://zeus.aldc.io/api/v1/memory" -Method POST -Headers @{"X-API-Key"=$key; "X-Tenant-ID"=$tenant; "Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body $body1 -TimeoutSec 15 | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\PaulRussell\\.env | Select-String "^ZEUS_API_KEY="\).ToString\(\).Split\("=",2\)[1]; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://zeus.aldc.io/health" -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://zeus.aldc.io/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://zeus.aldc.io/api/memories" -Method GET -Headers @{"X-API-Key"=$key} -TimeoutSec 5; "memories endpoint ok" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
